name: LeanPowers
description: Lightweight, high-rigor engineering workflows for Codex and Claude Code.
positioningZh: 轻量但不降级的 Agent 工程工作流

interface.longDescription: Risk-adaptive engineering workflows for shaping, building, debugging, reviewing, verifying, and shipping software with less workflow overhead.
defaultPrompt: Build this feature with the lightest safe workflow.
Debug this failure and prove the root cause.
Review and verify these changes before delivery.
